title: machaeranthera pinnatifida
intro: Machaeranthera pinnatifida, also known as Mountain Silverbell or varileaf greenthread, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Machaeranthera pinnatifida can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
